recommendedAction: No signs of disease detected. Continue regular watering and monitoring.
Remove affected leaves, apply copper-based fungicide, and avoid overhead watering.
Isolate affected plants immediately, apply systemic fungicide, and improve field drainage.
Apply sulfur-based fungicide and increase airflow between plants.
Remove and destroy infected plants, control whitefly vectors with neem oil spray.
Apply copper-based bactericide and avoid working in fields when leaves are wet.
Apply nitrogen-rich fertilizer or compost; yellowing should resolve within 1-2 weeks.
Improve drainage immediately, reduce watering frequency, and apply a fungicidal soil drench.
Spray with neem oil or insecticidal soap; introduce ladybirds as natural predators.
